blockingIssues.description: Document.data was implemented as serde_json::Value instead of the feature contract's required serde_json::Map<String, Value>, weakening the object-only invariant.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve timestamp-conversion guidance ambiguity by aligning AGENTS.md with the intended boundary (either conversion in Document::system_time or conversion exclusively in storage/Database).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md says conversion should happen in Database/storage while feature error-and-document-types implemented conversion in Document and passed current tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce explicit RED-first evidence (failing test command before code edits) in handoff or transcript checks, or relax the requirement in the skill text.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: error-and-document-types transcript shows baseline pass and edits without a pre-implementation failing test despite skill requiring RED-first.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether cargo check is mandatory in every implementation run and enforce consistency with followedProcedure reporting.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: schema-infrastructure review found followedProcedure=true despite transcript/handoff listing cargo test and clippy but no cargo check.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update residual temp-table wording for _cairn_tx_context to the regular-table row-lifecycle protocol to match implemented architecture.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: schema-infrastructure and versioning-transactions reviews identified remaining temp-table wording in validation-contract and architecture docs.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate reports of temp-table wording drift for _cairn_tx_context from multiple feature reviews.
